<!-- manuscript/tables/_tbl-01-example.qmd ----
     Include partial, not a page - the leading underscore keeps Quarto's
     website renderer from also rendering this as its own page (same
     convention as _quarto.yml/_freeze/_targets). Kept thin: the table
     itself lives in tbl-01-example.R via the pipeline; this file just
     pulls that target's value in via {{< include >}}. Needs its own
     library(flextable) call - without it the object prints as a dumped
     internal structure, since the print method's package isn't
     guaranteed loaded in this render session just because it built the
     object upstream.

     flextable_use_format_font() (R/functions.R) overrides flextable's
     Arial default to match each format's own body font - see its roxygen
     comment for why this must happen here at print time, not at build
     time in tbl-01-example.R. -->

```{r}
#| label: tbl-01-example
#| tbl-cap: "Example table generated from the pipeline."
library(flextable)
# R/functions.R isn't auto-sourced into Quarto's render session - tar_source()
# only runs inside the targets pipeline's R session.
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
targets::tar_read(tbl_01_example, store = here::here("_targets")) |>
  flextable_use_format_font()
```
